pages.text: The $(item)Large Nether Rocky Skyseed$() — a $(item)Large Rocky Skyseed$() centred in netherrack + nether quartz. A broad deep-mining isle.$(br2)$(bold)Where to look$()$(br)Netherrack and quartz from any island grown $(bold)in the Nether$().
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.

The Nether Rocky island writ large — a broad deep-mining isle of netherrack over blackstone, with far more $(item)nether quartz$(), $(item)nether gold$(), $(item)gilded blackstone$() and $(item)ancient debris$() (richest near the lava sea).
$(bold)Crafted$()$(br)A $(item)Large Rocky Skyseed$() in the centre of a 3x3 of $(item)netherrack$() and nether $(item)quartz$().
